message:
style: rustfmt formatting in happy_eyeballs test and multipart module

Apply rustfmt-consistent formatting:
- happy_eyeballs: collapse spawn closure chain and remove trailing
  whitespace in the dual-stack fallback test
- multipart: condense single-expression closures, method chains,
  struct literals, and test helper invocations to single-line form
  where they fit within line limits (-77 lines of vertical space)

No logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
